summary: Reworked the opening paragraph to avoid repeating Chapter 6's shared temporal scaffold while preserving Elise's return, Vautrin's note, and Ferrand's immediate pressure in the room.
edits: Reframed the chapter opening around voices carrying through the quarry instead of a by-the-time return construction.
Kept the Vautrin note, rain, market basket, and Ferrand's room-claiming entrance intact with only minimal line reshaping.
Confirmed no style-bible example lines appeared verbatim in the chapter.
